'''âzh-r-r-th''' ('''kazharrethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:exmatriculate|exmatriculate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-r-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:exmatriculate|exmatriculate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-r-r-th
|-
! Lemma
| kazharrethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizharethoko|thizharethoko]] || [[word:jizharethoko|jizharethoko]] || [[word:shizharethoko|shizharethoko]] || [[word:kizharethoko|kizharethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzharethoko|thuthuzharethoko]] || [[word:jujuzharethoko|jujuzharethoko]] || [[word:shushuzharethoko|shushuzharethoko]] || [[word:kukuzharethoko|kukuzharethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzharethoko|thuzharethoko]] || [[word:juzharethoko|juzharethoko]] || [[word:shuzharethoko|shuzharethoko]] || [[word:kuzharethoko|kuzharethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzharethoko|thuzharethoko]] || [[word:juzharethoko|juzharethoko]] || [[word:shuzharethoko|shuzharethoko]] || [[word:kuzharethoko|kuzharethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozharethoko|thozharethoko]] || [[word:jozharethoko|jozharethoko]] || [[word:shozharethoko|shozharethoko]] || [[word:kozharethoko|kozharethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzharethoko|thĂŠzharethoko]] || [[word:jĂŠzharethoko|jĂŠzharethoko]] || [[word:shĂŠzharethoko|shĂŠzharethoko]] || [[word:kĂŠzharethoko|kĂŠzharethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazharethoko|thathazharethoko]] || [[word:jajazharethoko|jajazharethoko]] || [[word:shashazharethoko|shashazharethoko]] || [[word:kakazharethoko|kakazharethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazharethoko|thazharethoko]] || [[word:jazharethoko|jazharethoko]] || [[word:shazharethoko|shazharethoko]] || [[word:kazharethoko|kazharethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazharethoko|thazharethoko]] || [[word:jazharethoko|jazharethoko]] || [[word:shazharethoko|shazharethoko]] || [[word:kazharethoko|kazharethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
